# Subdivision & Blocks
Block Administration in West Tripura District
Total Blocks (Nos.): 9 ( Nine)
1. Bamutia
2. Jirania
3. Belbari
4. Lefunga
5. Mandai
6. Dukli
7. Hezamara
8. Mohanpur
9. Old Agartala

Total Nos of Gram Panchayats (Nos.): 87
Total Nos of ADC Villages (Nos.): 85
Sub-Divisions in West Tripura District

1. Sadar
2. Mohanpur
3. Jirania

Total Moujas: 112
